goal: Understand how gift cards work with promos.
success_criteria: Agent explains: gift card is a payment method entered at checkout, CAN be used alongside one promo code (gift cards pay, promos discount), balance in Account > Gift Cards, no expiry, not redeemable for cash.

customer_msg: I got a Loomora gift card for my birthday. How do I use it, and can I stack it with SUMMER20?
agent_msg: You can use your Loomora gift card as a payment method at checkout. Just enter the card number and PIN when you're ready to pay. As for stacking with the SUMMER20 promo code, you can use both, but keep in mind that only one promo code can be applied per order. The gift card will cover the payment, and the promo code will apply a discount to the total amount. You can check your gift card balance in your account under the Gift Cards section.

customer_msg: Thanks! How do I add the gift card to my account?
agent_msg: You can add your gift card to your account by logging in and going to the Gift Cards section in your account settings. From there, you can enter the gift card number and PIN to add it to your account. If you have any trouble, feel free to let me know!

customer_msg: I'm browsing as a guest, so I don't have an account. How do I use the gift card without one?
agent_msg: You can use your gift card even if you're browsing as a guest. When you're ready to checkout, you'll be prompted to enter a payment method. There, you can select "Gift Card" and enter the gift card number and PIN. If you have any trouble, feel free to let me know!

customer_msg: Got it. Can I use the gift card and SUMMER20 together?
agent_msg: Yes, you can use both your gift card and the SUMMER20 promo code together. The gift card will cover the payment, and the SUMMER20 code will apply a discount to the total amount. Just enter the gift card details at checkout and apply the promo code before you complete your purchase.
